meta.title: aghub - One hub for every AI coding agent
meta.description: One hub for every AI coding agent. Unified configuration management for 22+ AI coding assistants. Manage MCP servers, portable skills, and project configs from a single desktop app.
meta.openGraphTitle: AGHub - Unified MCP & Skills Management for AI Coding Agents
meta.twitterTitle: AGHub - Unified MCP & Skills Management for AI Coding Agents

structuredData.description: Unified configuration management for 22+ AI coding assistants. Manage MCP servers, portable skills, and project configs from a single desktop app.

topBar.announcement: AGHUB {{version}} IS NOW AVAILABLE - ONE HUB FOR EVERY AI CODING AGENT

hero.description: Unified configuration management for 22+ AI coding assistants. Manage MCP servers, portable skills, and project configs from a single desktop app built with Tauri 2.

mcp.label: UNIFIED MCP MANAGEMENT
mcp.title: One config for every agent.
mcp.description: Deploy MCP server configurations across all your AI coding agents from a single interface. No more editing JSON files for each tool separately.
bullets: Supports Stdio, SSE, and StreamableHttp transports
Toggle servers on/off without deleting them
View and audit servers across all 22+ agents at once

skills.label: PORTABLE SKILLS
skills.title: Share skills across agents.
skills.description: Import .skill packages that work everywhere. Skills are verified, tracked, and portable - install once, use in any supported agent.

scoping.label: FLEXIBLE SCOPING
scoping.title: Global, project, or both.
scoping.description: Set configurations at any level. Global defaults apply everywhere, project overrides stay local, and merged views show the full picture.
bullets: Global, project, or merged configuration views
Complete audit trails for every resource

platform.label: CROSS-PLATFORM
platform.title: Native on every desktop.
platform.description: Built with Tauri 2 for native performance and a small footprint. Runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux without Electron's overhead.

supportedAgents.title: Supported Agents
supportedAgents.count: {{count}} agents and counting. One config to rule them all.

footer.tagline: One hub for every AI coding agent. Unified configuration for 22+ assistants.
